indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: The open floor space allows for stretching without obstructions.

indicators.name: wall-mounted artwork
indicators.rationale: The artwork on the wall could be distracting or obstructive if it is too close to the floor.

indicators.name: ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide ambient lighting, but do not create a distraction.

reasoning_summary: The open floor space and wall-mounted artwork make this space marginally suitable for yoga and stretching. While the open floor space is a positive feature, the artwork on the wall could potentially be a distraction or obstruction. The ceiling lights provide adequate lighting without creating a distraction.
